obituary_text: Margaret Louise Thompson, 87, passed away peacefully at her home surrounded by her loving family. Born in Houston, Texas, she dedicated her life to education, serving as a teacher for over 35 years.
Robert James Harrington, 80, beloved husband and father of three, passed away on March 1st. A veteran of the United States Army, Robert served his country with pride and distinction.
Dorothy Ann Williams, 93, passed away at Dallas Medical Center after a brief illness. She was a pillar of her community, known for her warmth and generosity.
Charles Edward Morrison, 75, passed away surrounded by family. A dedicated engineer for 40 years, Charles was known for his meticulous attention to detail and his love of the outdoors.
Helen Grace Patterson, 84, of Chicago, Illinois, passed away peacefully at home. A devoted mother and grandmother, Helen spent her retirement years volunteering at the local library.
William Thomas Burke passed away on March 8th. He is survived by his wife Mary, two sons, and four grandchildren.
